summary.headline: PRM is deterministically attested conformant to PNA Spec 0.1 for its declared flavor: 12 conformant, 4 not-applicable, 0 non-conformant across 18 evaluated ACs. 2 AC(s) carry self-attested partial-conformance flagged for human review (AC-PRM-A, AC-MCP-A); the EX-CLOUD-LLM exception is handled best-effort server-side (consent + honest signaling — an MCP server cannot identify the consuming LLM).

evidence.detail: Architecture.md attestation row; cited test ref(s) resolve and are non-deferred (conformance_lib.resolve_test_ref): tests/unit/test_private_store.py::test_import_seeds_private_and_keeps_shared_intact, tests/db/test_shared_db.py.
